name: Precedence Or With Comparisons
description: a > b | c < d — OR (7) > COMPARISON (4). '|' attaches tighter than '<' or '>'. Trace: 'a > b' starts, but in right-of->, 'b' then '| c' (OR=7 ≥ COMP+1=5) attaches yielding (b | c). Then > returns Greater(a, Or(b,c)). Outer top-level loop: '< d' attaches as Less. Result Less(Greater(a, Or(b,c)), d).
